generated_oml:
// C1: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensors embedded in the physical building for occupancy tracking, feeding operational data into the DT with tenant IDs and endpoint addresses for automated configuration"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring real-time energy consumption data from building systems, integrated into BIM for metadata extraction"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance VisualComfortSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors tracking visual comfort metrics (e.g., illuminance levels) in the LEED Platinum academic building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VisualComfortDataTransmitted
]

instance NonVisualHealthSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring non-visual health effects (e.g., air quality, noise levels) for tenant well-being monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData NonVisualHealthDataTransmitted
]

// C2: Physical Acting Components
instance TwinLightActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting system integrated via TwinLight project, modeled in BIM with control logic for adaptive lighting optimization"
]

instance BOREALISActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adaptive lighting system optimized via BOREALIS reinforcement learning framework for energy-efficient control"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control actuators for HVAC systems, synchronized with DT via Eclipse Hono middleware for real-time adjustments"
]

// C3: Data Transmitted
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance VisualComfortDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VisualComfortSensor
]

instance NonVisualHealthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom NonVisualHealthSensor
]

// C4: Data Models
instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched BIM model of the LEED Platinum academic building containing static geometry, topology, and functional attributes (device placements, control logic) for DT deployment"
]

instance OperationalDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Runtime data model populated with real-time operational metrics from sensors and middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for DT synchronization"
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven control logic definitions for building actuators (lighting, HVAC) integrated directly within BIM for bidirectional interaction"
]

// C5: Data
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy metrics (tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) extracted from sensor networks for automated DT configuration"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational energy consumption metrics derived from building control systems for optimization analytics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance ComfortData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual and non-visual comfort metrics (illuminance, air quality, noise) for tenant well-being assessment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VisualComfortDataTransmitted, NonVisualHealthDataTransmitted
]

// C6: Enablers
instance BIMModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating BIM-to-runtime artifact transformations for DT deployment"
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) facilitating bidirectional communication between physical and virtual building assets"
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization environment for interactive DT monitoring and simulation via Unreal Engine 5"
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools (Revit, ArchiCAD) for device modeling and control logic definition within the DT infrastructure"
]

// C7: Services
instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and visualization service using Unreal Engine 5 for immersive 3D interaction with the DT"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyVisualization, ComfortVisualization
]

instance BOREALISOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for building operations (energy efficiency, adaptive lighting) using BOREALIS reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationPolicy, LightingAdaptationPolicy
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for life-cycle management derived from BIM and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyForecasting, PerformanceBenchmarking
]

// C8: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of building occupancy patterns for tenant engagement and space utilization analysis"
]

instance ComfortVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization of visual and non-visual comfort metrics (illuminance, air quality) for health monitoring"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationPolicy : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated energy efficiency policies applied via BOREALIS reinforcement learning for HVAC and lighting systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingAdaptationPolicy : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic lighting control policies optimized for tenant comfort and energy savings using adaptive algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OccupancyForecasting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for occupancy forecasting to optimize building resource allocation"
]

instance PerformanceBenchmarking : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparative performance benchmarking against LEED standards for continuous improvement"
]

// C9: Environment
instance AcademicBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingBIMModel, OccupancySensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor,
    VisualComfortSensor, NonVisualHealthSensor, TwinLightActuator,
    BOREALISActuator, HVACActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals and commands generated by the DT are sent back to physical building systems via the same middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to automate adjustments in real-time. For example, the DT can dynamically adjust lighting or HVAC systems based on reinforcement learning policies (as demonstrated in the **BOREALIS** project) or user-defined control strategies embedded in BIM."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** time scale, with synchronization rates aligned to operational building cycles (e.g., sensor data refresh rates, control loop frequencies). The framework supports **low-latency bidirectional communication** (e.g., <100ms for critical control signals) to ensure seamless alignment between physical and virtual states."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with:
  - A **centralized DT framework** (hosted on standardized extension points) that orchestrates real-time data exchange (via Hono/Ditto) and service integration.
  - **Decentralized services** (e.g., lighting control, energy optimization) deployed as pluggable modules, enabling scalability and future extensibility.
  - **BIM as the semantic glue**, ensuring consistent interpretation of physical and virtual data across the DT ecosystem."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the entire life cycle of the building, covering:
  - **Design phase**: Enriched BIM models with device configurations and control logic (e.g., lighting automation).
  - **Construction phase**: Validation and deployment of DT artifacts (e.g., middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono/Ditto).
  - **Operational phase**: Real-time monitoring, adaptive control (e.g., via reinforcement learning in **BOREALIS**), and continuous evolution of services (e.g., via DT Engineers). The DT represents the building as **operated**, emphasizing runtime synchronization with physical assets."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT fidelity is ensured through:
  - **Semantic alignment**: Model-driven transformations preserve BIM semantics (e.g., device relationships, control logic) to minimize semantic drift.
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto ensures low-latency data exchange, reducing discrepancies between physical and virtual states.
  - **Verification/validation**: ODTE metric evaluates DT entanglement to quantify interoperability and architectural robustness.
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Runtime data from sensors and control systems is processed to account for operational variability (e.g., in adaptive lighting via BOREALIS)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections are established via:
  - **Middleware protocols**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange (e.g., MQTT, WebSockets) between physical sensors/actuators and DT services.
  - **Network architecture**: Scalable, service-oriented design supporting decentralized or centralized deployment topologies.
  - **BIM-to-DT integration**: Model-to-model transformations (e.g., via MDE) to map BIM attributes (e.g., device IDs, control rules) to DT runtime interfaces."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed via:
  - **Automated pipelines**: Model-driven deployment from BIM to runtime artifacts (e.g., service configurations, middleware endpoints).
  - **Standardized extension points**: Enable modular service integration without redeployment (e.g., adding new analytics or control strategies).
  - **Unreal Engine hosting**: Interactive visualization environment for end-users (facility managers, DT engineers).
  - **Cloud/edge deployment**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) supports distributed hosting for scalability."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External BIM systems**: Standardized extension points allow seamless interaction with third-party BIM tools (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD) for collaborative workflows.
  - **IoT platforms**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) enables bidirectional communication with IoT sensors/actuators beyond the building perimeter.
  - **Analytics platforms**: Custom services can integrate with external data lakes or AI/ML tools for advanced decision support."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is governed by:
  - **Physical building owner**: Primary ownership of sensor data and operational metrics, with DT services acting as intermediaries for processing/analysis.
  - **Middleware compliance**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto adheres to privacy standards (e.g., GDPR) for data transmission and storage, ensuring secure handling of sensitive operational data."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to:
  - **BIM standards**: ISO 12006-2, IFC (Industry Foundation Classes) for semantic consistency in building models.
  - **Middleware standards**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange, ensuring interoperability with IoT and OT ecosystems.
  - **Model-driven engineering (MDE)**: Industry-standard metamodels and transformations (e.g., QVT, ATL) for automated DT generation.
  - **AECO-specific standards**: Alignment with AECO workflows (e.g., TwinLight/BOREALIS projects) for domain-specific control configurations."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Encrypted data transmission**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) supports TLS/SSL for secure communication between physical and virtual assets.
  - **Access controls**: Role-based permissions for DT Engineers, Facility Managers, and Building Control Engineers to prevent unauthorized modifications.
  - **Remote operation safety**: DT services are designed to execute non-hazardous commands (e.g., lighting adjustments) remotely, avoiding direct human intervention in critical systems.
  - **Fault tolerance**: Real-time synchronization mechanisms ensure resilience against data loss or latency, minimizing operational disruptions."
]
